name: Evolution Game
author: Poki
description: Evolution Game is an adventure game where your world has been invaded, and it’s up to you to fight back and save your country! Battle waves of enemies, overcome dangerous obstacles, and evolve by unlocking powerful new skills. As you grow stronger, discover more resources to upgrade your abilities and face even tougher foes. Are you ready to fight, evolve, and reclaim your world? How to play Evolution Game? Use WASD, arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Press E to fight. Who created Evolution Game? Evolution Game is created by Dinobros. Play their other games on Poki: Porki Poke , My Kitten Home , My Super Tiny Market , goal-training, Distraction Driver and Sticker Album ! How can I play Evolution Game for free? You can play Evolution Game for free on Poki. Can I play Evolution Game on mobile devices and desktop? Evolution Game can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
